## Checklist
- [ ] Review and approval required before any remote action or merge to main — see AGENTS.md and BASE-STANDARDS-FOR-ORCHESTRATED-REPOS.md.
- [ ] All tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] Ruff + Pyright clean
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant
- [ ] No private details or links exposed (public repo)
- [ ] Detailed Conventional Commit message prepared (squash small related)
- [ ] Include "Closes #X", "Fixes #X", or "Resolves #X" in this PR body or commits to auto-close linked issues upon merge to main.

## Review

**Review and approval required before any remote action or merge to main.**
